name: list_projects
description: List accessible Sentry projects. View project slugs, IDs, status, settings, features, and organization details.

organization_slug.description: The slug of the organization to list projects from

name: resolve_short_id
description: Retrieve details about an issue using its short ID. Maps short IDs to issue details, project context, and status.

organization_slug.description: The slug of the organization the issue belongs to

short_id.description: The short ID of the issue to resolve (e.g., PROJECT-123)

name: get_sentry_event
description: Retrieve a specific Sentry event from an issue. Requires issue ID/URL and event ID.

issue_id_or_url.description: Either a full Sentry issue URL or just the numeric issue ID

event_id.description: The specific event ID to retrieve

organization_slug.description: The slug of the organization the issue belongs to

name: list_error_events_in_project
description: List error events from a specific Sentry project. View recent errors, frequency patterns, and occurrence timestamps.

organization_slug.description: The slug of the organization the project belongs to

project_slug.description: The slug of the project to list events from

name: create_project
description: Create a new project in Sentry. Track deployments, releases, and health metrics.

organization_slug.description: The slug of the organization to create the project in

team_slug.description: The slug of the team to associate the project with

name.description: The name of the project to create

platform.description: The platform for the project (e.g., python, javascript, etc.)

name: list_project_issues
description: List issues from a Sentry project. Monitor issue status, severity, frequency, and timing.

organization_slug.description: The slug of the organization the project belongs to

project_slug.description: The slug of the project to list issues from

name: list_issue_events
description: List events for a specific Sentry issue. Analyze event details, metadata, and patterns.

organization_slug.description: The slug of the organization the issue belongs to

issue_id.description: The ID of the issue to list events for

name: get_sentry_issue
description: Retrieve and analyze a Sentry issue. Accepts issue URL or ID.

issue_id_or_url.description: Either a full Sentry issue URL or just the numeric issue ID

organization_slug.description: The slug of the organization the issue belongs to

name: list_organization_replays
description: List replays from a Sentry organization. Monitor user sessions, interactions, errors, and experience issues.

organization_slug.description: The slug of the organization to list replays from

project_ids.description: Optional array of project IDs to filter replays by

environment.description: Optional environment to filter replays by

stats_period.description: Optional time range in format <number><unit> (e.g., '1d'). Units: m, h, d, w

start.description: Optional start of time range (UTC ISO8601 or epoch seconds)

end.description: Optional end of time range (UTC ISO8601 or epoch seconds)

sort.description: Optional field to sort results by

query.description: Optional structured query string to filter results

per_page.description: Optional limit on number of results to return

name: setup_sentry
description: Set up Sentry for a project returning a DSN and instructions for setup.

organization_slug.description: The slug of the organization to create the project in

team_slug.description: The slug of the team to associate the project with

project_name.description: The name of the project to create

environment.description: Optional environment name (e.g., production, staging, development)

name: search_errors_in_file
description: Search for Sentry errors occurring in a specific file. Find all issues related to a particular file path or filename.

organization_slug.description: The slug of the organization in Sentry

project_slug.description: The slug of the project in Sentry

file_identifier.description: The path or name of the file to search for errors in

identifier_type.description: Whether to search by filename or full filepath

view.description: Level of detail in results (default: detailed)
